# Bosphor

> Cross-chain storage intent routing for Walrus

This file contains links to documentation sections following the llmstxt.org standard.

## Table of Contents

- [Architecture](https://docs.bosphor.xyz/architecture.md): ![Bosphor System Architecture](./diagrams/architecture.svg)
- [Changelog](https://docs.bosphor.xyz/changelog.md): The initial release establishing the complete cross-chain storage intent pipeline from EVM to Walrus and back.
- [Contract Interface Reference](https://docs.bosphor.xyz/contract-interface.md): Integrators should import `IBosphorAdapter.sol` from `contracts/evm/src/interfaces/` rather than the full `BosphorAdapter.sol`. The interface inclu...
- [dApp Integration Tutorial](https://docs.bosphor.xyz/dapp-tutorial.md): Practical examples for integrating Bosphor into a frontend application. These examples show how to submit storage intents, estimate fees, and liste...
- [Deployment Guide](https://docs.bosphor.xyz/deployment.md): <AgentPrompt prompt="Deploy the Bosphor contracts to Sepolia and Sui testnet. My .env file is already configured with RPC URLs and private keys. Ru...
- [Glossary](https://docs.bosphor.xyz/glossary.md): Key terms used throughout the Bosphor documentation.
- [Integration Checklist](https://docs.bosphor.xyz/integration-checklist.md): Step-by-step checklist for integrating with Bosphor. Complete each item before moving to the next.
- [Introduction](https://docs.bosphor.xyz/docs/intro.md): <HomepageHero />
- [Known Limitations](https://docs.bosphor.xyz/known-limitations.md): Current constraints and limitations of the Bosphor protocol as of Milestone 1.
- [LayerZero Two-Step Verification Flow](https://docs.bosphor.xyz/lz-verification-flow.md): Bosphor uses LayerZero v2 for both directions of its cross-chain protocol. This page describes the message flow, encoding formats, and trust bounda...
- [Quickstart](https://docs.bosphor.xyz/quickstart.md): Get Bosphor running on Sepolia + Sui Testnet in about 15 minutes.
- [Relayer Operator Guide](https://docs.bosphor.xyz/relayer.md): The Bosphor relayer is a NestJS service that bridges Sui and EVM. It polls both chains for events, uploads payloads to Walrus, executes storage int...
- [Security Model](https://docs.bosphor.xyz/security-model.md): Bosphor's security relies on LayerZero v2 DVN verification for both legs of the cross-chain message flow, with the relayer acting as an untrusted e...
- [Sui Walrus Executor](https://docs.bosphor.xyz/sui-executor.md): The walrus executor module (`sui/executor/sources/walrus_executor.move`) handles the final step of a storage intent: verifying that data was stored...
- [Testing Guide](https://docs.bosphor.xyz/testing.md): Bosphor has four test layers: Solidity unit tests, Move unit tests, relayer unit tests, and an end-to-end cross-chain test. All four must pass befo...
- [Troubleshooting](https://docs.bosphor.xyz/troubleshooting.md): Common issues and their solutions when working with Bosphor.
